title: cereus peruvianus
intro: Cereus peruvianus, also known as the Peruvian apple cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cereus peruvianus include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Cereus peruvianus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's stems and flowers.
